title: CLI Reference
excerpt: Learn how to use the Static Website Generator command line interface.
content:
# CLI Reference

The Static Website Generator CLI helps you validate, build and package themes.

## Validate a Theme

Validate your theme before packaging it.

```bash
npm run validate
```

The validator checks that all required templates, layouts and configuration files are present.

## Package a Theme

Create a distributable SWG theme package.

```bash
npm run package
```

The resulting package can be imported directly into Static Website Generator.

## Development Server

Start the local development server.

```bash
npm run dev
```

This launches Astro and watches for file changes while you develop your theme.

## Install Dependencies

Install all required dependencies.

```bash
npm install
```

## Build for Production

Generate a production build of the theme.

```bash
npm run build
```

## Typical Workflow

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
npm run validate
npm run package
```

Following this workflow ensures your theme is ready for import into Static Website Generator.
meta_description: Reference for the Static Website Generator command line interface.
